title.en: Because of this, the battle gate is willing to ...

content.en:
For others, the Forbidden Yuan Blade is a holy relic that is simply desperate, and once it is used, even if it kills the enemy, it is almost useless if it does not die.

Moreover, more often than not, it is the enemy who does not die, but the self who dies.

And in the Dark Sanctuary, the effect is better than the Forbidden Yuan Blade, and there are no side effects of the holy relics and other secret treasures, although they are very precious and even rarer, but as long as there is, it will make the value of the Forbidden Yuan Blade drop a lot.

Therefore, no matter how powerful the Forbidden Yuan Blade is, even if it is on the list of holy relics, for many people, its value is still not high.

Because of this, the battle gate is willing to take it out.

Of course, they didn't want Ye Tian to choose the Forbidden Yuan Blade, they just casually listed it on it.

But for Ye Tian, the Forbidden Yuan Blade was a perfect fit for him.

Ye Tian can copy the body, and he can completely let the copy body fight with the forbidden blade, even if the copy body falls, it will have no effect on Ye Tian.

Therefore, with the Forbidden Yuan Blade, Ye Tian is equivalent to having the combat power of a Supreme Domain Ancestor!

Even if it is the combat power of the strongest domain ancestor who cannot fight for a long time, it can easily crush any top domain ancestor.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I choose the Forbidden Yuan Blade!"

Ye Tian decided.

"What, you want to ban the Yuan Blade?"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was shocked.

If it is someone else, they may need the Forbidden Yuan Blade to save their lives, such as some Supreme Domain Ancestors whose potential has been exhausted and have little room for improvement, they definitely need the Forbidden Yuan Blade, and they can escape from the weaker and invincible Domain Ancestors at critical moments.

But who is Ye Tian?

After cultivating the Eternal Immortal Holy Body and mastering the Four Great Holy Techniques, isn't it stupid that such a demonic genius actually chose the Forbidden Yuan Blade?

If he really encounters danger, he still wants to use the Forbidden Yuan Blade?

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, there are a lot of life-saving things, although the effect of the Forbidden Yuan Blade is good, there is no need to choose it! Besides, you are unlikely to encounter any danger, you are a Holy Endower, and other Holy Gates will not dare to take the risk of killing you!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor persuaded.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I have my secrets, the Forbidden Yuan Blade is very suitable for me, will I joke about my future?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Seeing Ye Tian's resolute attitude, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor sighed and said, "Okay, I will apply, it depends on whether the battle gate will give you the forbidden yuan blade!"

"Thank you Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tiandao.

Not long after, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor came over with the Holy Relic Forbidden Yuan Blade.

The Forbidden Yuan Blade is a black bladed knife that exudes a demonic aura, and it is very strange at a glance.

But I have to say that this holy relic is very powerful, much stronger than Jin Chenjia.

Ye Tian obtained the Forbidden Yuan Blade and then began to refine it.

The holy relics are difficult to refine, and it is impossible to refine them with Ye Tian's cultivation, but the battle gate naturally has a way.

"Pure Yuan Saint Crystal!"

This treasure appeared in Ye Tian's hand, this thing was also relatively precious, it could help the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor to refine the holy relic, and through it, he could continuously refine the holy relic.

Ye Tian held the Pure Yuan Saint Crystal in his hand, and his soul power re-entered the holy object through the Pure Yuan Saint Crystal, constantly refining the holy object.

Of course, this refining is a waste of time.

In the million-fold time array, it took Ye Tiandu thousands of years to successfully refine, which shows how much time he spent.

With the help of the Pure Yuan Saint Crystal, Ye Tian refined the Holy Relic Jinchen Armor and the Holy Relic Forbidden Yuan Blade.

Subsequently, he returned to the Terran and passed on the Starwind Holy Body to his son, and also gave the Starwind Sacred Heart to his son, asking him to abolish the previous Holy Body and switch to the Starwind Holy Body.

This kind of abolition of the Holy Body is no problem, but there will be a period of weakness, but if it is an ordinary Holy Body to become such a powerful Star Wind Holy Body, it will naturally be worth it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to comprehend and cultivate the space holy technique, and that space holy technique was called - Void Slash!

The power of this spatial holy technique is very powerful, once Ye Tian cultivates it, its power is much more terrifying than the sword star of the light-clothed saint maiden, and it will definitely become his strongest attack holy skill.

Moreover, Ye Tian also continued to refine the resources he had obtained from the Holy War, striving to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the consummation realm as soon as possible, coupled with the resources provided by the Battle Gate, he was not short of resources at all, and his cultivation speed was very fast.

Year after year passed.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Immortal Holy Body finally stepped into the realm of perfection under the accumulation of massive resources.

Moreover, his Spatial Saint Technique Void Slash had already stepped into the Dacheng realm.

The only pity is that he has not cultivated a holy technique to the consummation realm so far, and the consummation of the holy technique is still relatively difficult, not a matter of resources, but a matter of time.

Otherwise, the Flying Saint Son, the Zilin Holy Son, and these Holy Endowments have not cultivated a holy technique to the consummation realm so far, and the time it takes is too long, and they even need some special auxiliary treasures to comprehend before they have a little hope.

It is difficult to cross the shackles of Dacheng and Consummation, unless you step into the level of the Domain Ancestor, the soul has undergone a qualitative change, and then you can comprehend the Holy Technique, it will not be difficult to comprehend the Holy Technique to the realm of Consummation.

It can be returned to the realm of comprehending the holy technique, and the Dacheng realm seems to be the limit, and the light-clothed saintess can cultivate the two holy techniques to the consummation realm, and it is definitely the saintess who has paid a great price, and this price cannot be replicated.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai didn't waste time to specialize in one holy skill, otherwise the holy skill would not be perfect, there would be no way to break through, and it would also affect the progress of other holy skills, resulting in a very slow increase in strength, which would be a big loss.

Since Ye Tian had obtained a large amount of resources, the Terrans had benefited a lot, and various treasures that assisted in cultivation appeared in the Terrans.

In the past few million years, the human race has given birth to many half-step domain ancestors, but the outside world does not know about it.

Ye Tian's relatives have benefited even more, such as his wife, daughter, son, and sister have all stepped into the level of the Unified Realm, and their combat power is all very strong, any of them can easily crush the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master.

this day.

The Mountain Lord of Fengshan contacted Ye Tian and informed Ye Tian of something.

He, in contact with the ontology.

Windy Mountain.

Ye Tian saw the Wind Mountain Lord, but at this moment, he felt that the Wind Mountain Lord had changed, and his gaze and aura had undergone subtle changes.

Obviously, the main doppelganger of Fengshan Mountain is connected with the ontological consciousness, and it is strange that the two are fused and do not change.

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, my main body has come, and the entire Black Wind Mountain has moved, and I am coming across the Dark Forbidden Domain. In addition, there is also bad news, there are powerful people who are following Black Wind Mountain! this time, there may even be a top domain ancestor appearing!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

"The top domain ancestors and those domain ancestors are for the mysterious treasure of the forbidden Void Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's just part of the reason!" the Wind Mountain Lord explained, "Actually, there is another reason that doesn't tell you, do you know why those top domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm are so eager to break through? It's not just a matter of strength, but more importantly, they want to attack the Supreme Domain Ancestors, so as to cross the Dark Forbidden Domain and go to the Dark Sacred Domain. And without the strength of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, he would not be able to reach the Dark Sanctuary at all, and if he went, he would die. "

Ye Tian nodded, he really didn't know why he couldn't go to the Dark Sacred Domain if he didn't reach the Supreme Domain Ancestor, why some Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm could get away with crossing from the Divine Heaven Realm to the Dao Mountain Realm.

But now, he knew the reason from the Battle Gate, and even knew more about it than the people in the Divine Heaven Realm.
